title: b9670
description: Fix and restrict NVFP4 edge-cases in llama-graph ( #24331 ) Move post-GEMM MUL required for dequant b4 lora and bias add see #23484 : For lora, I would presume we want fully dequantized values before doing the residuals, but this depends on how the LORAs were generated.
